title: geraniospermum oenotherae
intro: Geraniospermum oenotherae, also known as the Evening Primrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Onagraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its oil content, which is rich in gamma-linolenic acid (GLA), an essential fatty acid that has anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Geraniospermum oenotherae include relief from symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as alleviation of conditions like eczema and arthritis due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, including oil and capsules, are available in health food stores and online, and are often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
